programme.desc: The ice has arrived and the fleet races to reach their opilio quota.

programme.desc: Jake races to save the crew after hearing a banging sound on the boat.

programme.title: Carpe Diem
programme.desc: Crab fishing season begins and an eager new captain joins the fleet.

programme.title: First Timers
programme.desc: Jake has doubts about hiring on a good friend with a bad attitude.

programme.title: MeatEater - Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Trapped in History: Wyoming Beaver
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater - Conservation History, New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lone Star Pork: Texas Hog
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Memories: Montana Black Bear
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads deep into Montana's rugged mountains to hunt black bears, reflecting on two decades of memories in this harsh yet captivating landscape. Joined by memories of his brother and their youthful adventures, Steve navigates grizzly country, contemplates the passage of time, and explores the evolving nature of hunting. Through encounters with both bears and the terrain, Steve seeks not just game but a connection to the past and the lessons it holds.

programme.title: MeatEater - Nevada Mule Deer with Joe Rogan
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with Joe Rogan in Nevada's high desert to bowhunt for elusive mule deer bucks. Surrounded by vast public lands and rugged terrain, they navigate the challenges of close-range stalking with their bows. With Joe's enthusiasm for archery and Steve's experience, the duo pushes their limits in pursuit of these wary deer, embracing the highs and lows of hunting in one of America's most unforgiving landscapes.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose Part 2
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Prince Of Wales: Fishing and Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads back to his fish shack on Prince of Wales Island in Southeast Alaska, this time with friend and colleague Morgan Fallon. Known for his cinematography, Mo now wants to switch roles from behind the camera to filling his freezer. Together, they embark on a classic Alaskan adventure: fishing for rockfish, setting shrimp pots, and hunting Sitka blacktail deer, all while reminiscing about past trips and discovering new ways the wilderness shapes them.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wyoming Sage Grouse
programme.desc: Steve and his friend Ronny Boehme head to the vast sagebrush seas of Southeast Wyoming to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Prince of Wales: Sitka Blacktail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Late October in Southeast Alaska finds Steve, Ryan Callahan, and Mark Borman chasing Sitka blacktail deer. As the bucks begin their descent from the alpine into dense timber, the trio faces the challenge of hunting in the thick, damp rainforest. While navigating through muskeg patches and testing their luck with calling techniques, they must contend with unpredictable weather and tough terrain. When deer prove elusive, they turn to fishing and foraging.

programme.title: MeatEater - Prince of Wales: Sitka Blacktail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Midway through a challenging hunt on Prince of Wales Island, Steve, Ryan Callahan, and Mark Borman are searching for Sitka blacktail deer. The rut hasn't kicked in as expected, leaving the hunters frustrated and the deer elusive. Adapting their strategies, they decide to split up and quietly stalk through dense woods and muskeg. After days of patience and perseverance, a mix of skill, luck, and determination finally leads them closer to success.

programme.title: You're Missing the Point
programme.desc: The boyfriend (Cantinflas) of the servant of a rich industrial man, gets into the house in order to kill a mad dog. Suddenly this man appears so the servant tells him that Cantinflas is his wife's brother (Leonardo), who had been lost for years. The rich man then remembers that his father in law's testament could only be paid when all brothers get together, so treats Cantinflas, a real bum, as a king.

programme.title: Wild Flower
programme.desc: One of the gratest love stories ever told!!

programme.title: Escuela de música
programme.desc: About an industrialist with lots of money and a singing teacher forced to leave school because she lacks financial resources. Thanks to their singing skills, they will join in a tour through different countries of Latin America.

programme.title: Escuela de valientes
programme.desc: An early 1960s Mexican western in the vaquero style. Recently widowed ranch owner Gabriela Bermúdez is facing trouble from neighboring haciendado Don Atenor. Her aunt, Tia Lola, tells her this is why she should remarry and Gabriela reluctantly accepts the notion. She decides he should be ranch savvy and strong and goes to the town fair to peruse the bravado and deeds of the macho men hanging out. Agustin and his buddy El Tigre provide comic relief, as Tigre falls in love with Gabriela, though he is not really her type. Madly in love he tries to impress her in increasingly comic situations, eventually taking on the guise of a gun runner to seem more worldly and able to handle situations. Director Julian Soler does a good job of balancing the light and serious sides of the movie making the production an enjoyable example of early 1960s Mexican vaquero movies. The tradition of the American cowboy, is the subject matter of countless Hollywood movies. But those movies have never dealt with the true origins with the Mexican "vaquero" whose traditions were adapted to create the iconic American "Cowboy", originally a truly Mexican tradition.

programme.title: You're Missing the Point
programme.desc: The boyfriend (Cantinflas) of the servant of a rich industrial man, gets into the house in order to kill a mad dog. Suddenly this man appears so the servant tells him that Cantinflas is his wife's brother (Leonardo), who had been lost for years. The rich man then remembers that his father in law's testament could only be paid when all brothers get together, so treats Cantinflas, a real bum, as a king.

programme.title: Capítulo 178
programme.desc: Nico's parents, Yuli and Joel, confront him about Lupita not being Jewish. However, Joel accepts their love while Yuli does not. Roberta gives Diego the signed Lenny Kravitz guitar. Karen demands her father to fire Nico's dad. Alma covers for Mía by saying Gastón is her boyfriend. The guys give Giovanni and Vico a hard time for dating. Gastón is angry that Mía and Miguel will be going out with Franco again. José reveals that her and Téo are officially dating. Valeria overhears Mía's conversation with Alma. Alma learns that Roberta and Diego are dating. Tomás blurts about the bet.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 180
programme.desc: Mía and Miguel go search for answers. Diego realizes he's falling in love with Roberta. José meets with a woman from the orphanage to find out who her tutor is. Pilar gives out cheat sheets in order to get revenge. Alma comes up with a plan to keep Mía from going to Paris. Roberta tells Celina the truth of the date with Simon.

programme.title: Capítulo 181
programme.desc: Miguel tells Mía a plan to find out if Gastón is a millionaire. Roberta learns from Simon and Tomás the truth about Diego's intentions. Mía asks Gastón for money for her birthday party; he agrees to pay for everything at no expense. José and Téo accept their abandonment and put their trust in each other; Gastón interrupts with threats to both. Roberta goes home; Alma slaps Diego for hurting Roberta. Miguel overhears Gastón planning to get money for Mía; she confronts Gastón demanding he tell her the truth, when he refuses she ends their relationship.

programme.title: Capítulo 182
programme.desc: Gastón tells Mía about himself and his past. Franco catches Mía and Gastón together. Gastón declares his love for Mía and asks Franco for a chance to prove he is worthy. Renata has suspicions about Madariaga. Franco and Miguel discuss Gastón. Alma takes Roberta far away to recover. Giovanni is allowed to return to school; he introduces his real parents to the class.

programme.title: Capítulo 183
programme.desc: Giovanni openly accepts his parents and his love for Vico in front of the entire school. Roberta wrecks on Simon's motorcycle. Miguel decides to finish with his revenge then return to Monterrey. Franco gets injured and Alma leaves him by himself. Mía has dance rehearsals; Gastón gets angry when she dances with Miguel. Tomás decides to stay with Pilar to get good grades. Gastón punishes Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 185
programme.desc: Gastón punishes the students. Roberta devises a long con to get revenge on Diego. Valeria throws a fit when she learns that Mía will get her party; Franco admonishes her. Mía promises Gastón she'll stay away from Miguel. Franco begs Miguel for help with protecting Mía. Lupita tells Galia who stole the tests. Gandia withdraws his helping hand to Tomás. Gastón begins an investigation into Miguel. Pilar attacks Lupita.

programme.title: Capítulo 186
programme.desc: Valeria accuses Alma of trying to take Franco. Celina teams up with Pilar to get revenge on Lupita. Simon snaps an unflattering picture of Diego, Giovanni, and Tomás; copies are made anonymously. Celina scratches out Lupita's name on Mía's guest list. Miguel follows Gastón to a bank where he exits handcuffed to a briefcase. Roberta beats up Pilar to defend Lupita and blames her for the photo. Miguel and Mía partner up in class; he tells her to ask Gastón about his morning.

programme.title: Capítulo 187
programme.desc: Mía asks Gastón where he went, he tells her but then reveals he has a plan to get rid of Miguel. Mendiola congratulates Gandia then suspends Pilar for a week. Pilar tells Celina they have to make Lupita leave. Simon and Diego fight. Miguel updates Franco in return he put him in charge of Mía's party details. Lupita catches Celina vomiting. Gastón continues his investigation into Miguel. When Diego finds out Roberta is dating Simon, he tells her he loves her and kisses her. Madariaga continues to push Hilda and Hilario together. Gastón decides to leave for "Monterrey. Mía finds the letter to Lupita.

programme.desc: There is a leak in one of the gas tanks and Germán is in charge of repairing it. Benito has a casting for the Rocky movie.

programme.title: Arturo sastre
programme.desc: Arturo takes out his old sewing machine to dedicate himself to sewing. Vanesa brings a rooster with Alzheimer's into the building that crows all day.

programme.title: El trabajo de Alejandra
programme.desc: The López Pérez need an extra income of money and Alejandra goes out to look for a job. Benito meets a friend from the castings and invites him to the apartment.

programme.title: La gotera
programme.desc: A leak in the López Pérez bathroom causes leaks in Pedro's apartment. Benito and Liz go to a casting for the musical Grease.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Fiesta de casados
programme.desc: Luis feels lonely and Silvia encourages him to organize a meeting in the apartment. Luis invites the married men in the building. Vanesa entrusts Germán with a little bird with behavior problems.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis accidentally break Silvia's San Antonio statue. The López Pérez family complain about the high water consumption in the building.

programme.title: No se peleen
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis fight over Borre's last taco and they stop talking. Vanesa leaves Benito in charge of a cat.

programme.title: El álbum
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis find a photo album in the garbage and through it they remember the best of the worst of the neighbors.

programme.title: Germán por un día
programme.desc: Germán gets sick and the neighbors decide to help him with the building work. Magdalena invents a trip to Paris to show off to her friend.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Intruder Alert
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: Pass the Buck
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: Baby on the Way
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man's erratic behavior.

programme.title: Carside Confessions
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: Out-of-Towner
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: Pit Stop
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: No Good, Very Bad Day
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon's true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: A Family Affair
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police's attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: Fury Road
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it's better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: Fixin' to Stop
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.desc: CarShield offers a wide range of vehicle service plans, and they're set up to be very flexible. We want to make it easy for you to customize a plan that fits your needs perfectly. You'll be surprised at how affordable and flexible our service is.

programme.title: This Is What A Miracle Feels Like
programme.desc: Sometimes, a miracle feels like you're free, but you're still running. Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us to look for signs that God is at work when our feelings haven't caught up to our reality in This Is What A Miracle Feels Like.

programme.title: Knocking Through The No
programme.desc: In Knocking Through The No, Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that the doors of tomorrow's opportunities swing on the hinges of today's obedience.

programme.title: You Don't Have To
programme.desc: Feeling overwhelmed by the pressure of obstacles and obligations? Shift your attention from how you'll get through it to Who will get you through it. You're not alone, God is with you.

programme.title: Never Stop Knocking
programme.desc: In Never Stop Knocking, we learn how to be persistent in the face of doubt.

programme.title: Don't Let The Attack Distract You
programme.desc: Right when you start to feel some positive momentum in your life, an attack comes out of nowhere. Sound familiar? Pastor Steven uses the parable of the seeds to illustrate what to do when the enemy attacks and how to persevere in your purpose.

programme.title: From What If to What Is
programme.desc: In From What If To What Is, Pastor Steven Furtick encourages us to stop worrying about what could be and start trusting who God is.

programme.title: The Blessing Of Letting Go
programme.desc: In The Blessing Of Letting Go, Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that when we worship God in the middle of our situation, it relieves the pressure we feel when we try to handle it on our own.

programme.title: Cover The Spread
programme.desc: When the odds are against you, face the battle anyway. In Cover The Spread, Pastor Steven Furtick challenges us to turn our problems into petitions - because God's got the answer.

programme.title: Ophelia Visits Morticia
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: Addams Cum Laude
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: Cat Addams
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can affect cures.

programme.title: Lurch's Little Helper
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Policy
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson, the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: Lurch's Grand Romance
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler in to a new personality.

programme.title: Ophelia's Career
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family Goes To School
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: Morticia And The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: Fester's Punctured Romance
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: Gomez, The Politician
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family Tree
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: Morticia Joins The Ladies League
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where he is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: Halloween With The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: Green Eyed Gomez
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wednesday Leaves Home
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: Lisa Has A Calf
programme.desc: The cow that Oliver (Eddie Albert) bought from Mr. Haney is pregnant. Afraid that Haney will claim the new calf, Oliver and Eb decide to keep it secret...only to have the people of Hooterville think that it is Lisa (Eva Gabor) who is expecting!

programme.title: The Wedding Anniversary
programme.desc: It's the Douglases' wedding anniversary and, after initially pretending not to remember, Oliver (Eddie Albert) makes clear that he knows the date very well, he just can't remember exactly how many years he and Lisa (Eva Gabor) have been married.

programme.title: What Happened In Scranton
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is shocked that Hooterville has no beauty parlor, and the Ladies' Every-Other-Wednesday Afternoon-Discussion-Club nominates her to make it happen. Of course, Oliver's mother is happy to help, even if it means underhanded tactics.

programme.title: Give Me Land, Lots Of Land
programme.desc: When Oliver's neighbor, Mr. Watson, decides to do some traveling, Oliver (Eddie Albert) buys the farm which adjoins his property, but not the house on it. Lisa (Eva Gabor) misunderstands and thinks the beautiful farmhouse is their new home.

programme.title: I Didn't Raise My Husband To Be A Fireman
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers the only requirement to join the Hooterville Valley Fire Department is that he must play a musical instrument. Meanwhile Lisa (Eva Gabor) tries her hand at cooking something besides "hotscakes" for breakfast.

programme.title: Lisa Bakes A Cake
programme.desc: Believing he will never get a moment's peace, Oliver (Eddie Albert) is annoyed when Lisa (Eva Gabor) puts a listing in the new phone book: "Oliver Douglas, Attorney at Law"�but it is a different story when no one calls for his services.

programme.title: The Price Of Apples
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert)'s apple crop is ready to be harvested, and he decides to take them to market himself and make a killing. Of course, getting to market before the price drops proves a little more difficult than Oliver anticipates.

programme.title: What's In A Name?
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) becomes enamored of Mr. Kimball (Alvy Moore), the county agent. However, though she feminizes herself and gets all gussied up, he refuses to go out with a girl named Ralph. Can Oliver solve the situation legally?

programme.title: The Day Of Decision
programme.desc: Six months is up! Now, Lisa (Eva Gabor) gets to decide whether she and Oliver (Eddie Albert) will remain on the farm or go back to New York and their Park Avenue lifestyle! Will this be the final straw for Green Acres?

programme.title: The Deputy
programme.desc: Sam Drucker (Frank Cady) is leaving on a much-needed two-week vacation and talks Oliver (Eddie Albert) into assuming his duties as deputy sheriff. But Oliver soon learns enforcing the law isn't quite as easy as it looks.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Molly Turgiss
programme.desc: Whatever you do, don't say her name and especially while playing checkers down at Drucker's! An old hag named Molly Turgiss (Renie Riano), who died twenty years before the Douglases (Eddie Albert, Eva Gabor) came to town, might be haunting them.

programme.title: Never Look A Gift Tractor In The Mouth
programme.desc: It's a few days before Oliver (Eddie Albert)'s birthday, and Lisa (Eva Gabor) doesn't know quite what to get him�until the old Hoyt Clagwell goes kerflooey! So, she goes out and buys the biggest and fanciest tractor she can find.

programme.title: Send A Boy To College
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Eb (Tom Lester) has a way with sick animals after Eb cures Arnold, the pig, and Alice, the chicken, and offers to put him through veterinary college. But will life in Green Acres ever be the same without Ed?!

programme.title: Horse? What Horse?
programme.desc: A horse follows Oliver (Eddie Albert) home, but every time he tries to show it to his wife, the horse disappears. Lisa (Eva Gabor) assumes that her husband is imagining things�and as more animals show up, Oliver begins to think so too.

programme.title: The Rains Came
programme.desc: Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) takes Oliver (Eddie Albert) to Pixley Superior Municipal Court and sues him for non-payment of a vital contract over the little matter of some rain�or lack thereof. Does Mr. Haney know who he's up against? Does Oliver?

programme.title: Culture
programme.desc: The Third-Tuesday-of-Every-Month-Culture-Committee of the Every-Other-Wednesday-Afternoon-Discussion-Club decides that Hooterville needs some "culture" in the form of a symphony orchestra. And Lisa (Eva Gabor) may just know the perfect conductor.

programme.title: Uncle Ollie
programme.desc: Oliver's (Eddie Albert) nephew Charles (Don Edmonds) arrives for a visit, and Oliver is completely shaken up when the boy turns out to be a long-haired, motorcycle-ridin', hippy-dippy type. But, boy, does he know a thing or two about engines.
